title.en: Then, he started the second refining.

content.en:
With these three Tianhai Golden Pill materials, Ye Tian can refine Tianhai Golden Pill.

It is not easy to refine high-level Chonggong Golden Pill, but Ye Tian is still very confident.

He has been studying the secret recipe of high-level Chonggong Golden Pill for a long time, constantly comprehending and deducing. Now, even if it is the first time to refine, he is fully confident that he can refine it.

"Let's start!"

Ye Tian began to refine Tianhai Golden Pill. After a while, the first Tianhai Golden Pill was successfully refined.

However, the first Tianhai Golden Pill was not of high quality. Some were even only 50% to 60% pure, and the highest quality was only 61%.

Of course, he summed up his experience. If he refined it for the second time, the purity would definitely be much higher.

Then, he started the second refining.

The process, the purity of the Tianhai Golden Pill refined for the second time was more than 60%.

The third Tianhai Golden Pill refined even had a purity of 76%.

He had no interest in these Tianhai Golden Pills, but no matter what purity they were, there were practitioners who wanted them, and they could definitely be sold at a high price.

Then, he came to find Gui Lao again.

...

"Gui Lao, these Tianhai Golden Pills are not of high purity, but there should be someone who needs them. You sell them for me and collect more materials by the way."

Ye Tian said.

"Okay!"

Gui Lao agreed.

Then, he went to do the work.

He didn't complain, and he could also get a lot of benefits from doing things for Ye Tian.

Besides, he didn't dare to offend Ye Tian, ​​so he could only do his best to do the work.

After a period of time.

Gui Lai bought a lot of Tianhai Golden Pill materials for Ye Tian again, so that Ye Tian could continue to refine Tianhai Golden Pill.

As time went by, the purity of the Tianhai Golden Pill refined by Ye Tian naturally became higher and higher.

"Eighty percent!"

"Ninety percent!"

Until this day, Ye Tian finally refined a Tianhai Golden Pill with a purity of 100%.

Afterwards, he used the Tianhai Golden Pill with a purity of 100% to improve his cultivation, and his cultivation soared rapidly.

The 31st Heaven!

The 32nd Heaven!

The 33rd Heaven!

A long time passed, and Ye Tian's cultivation reached the 34th Heaven. After reaching the 34th Heaven, his cultivation slowed down, but it was still improving.

So, he continued to take the Tianhai Golden Pill to improve his cultivation, and strived to rely on a large number of Tianhai Golden Pills to advance his cultivation to the 35th Heaven realm.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian relied on a large number of Tianhai Golden Pills with a purity of 100% to forcibly advance his cultivation to the 35th Heaven realm.

However, at this time, Tianhai Jindan was useless to him, even if it was a 100% pure Tianhai Jindan.

“It seems that if you want to quickly improve your cultivation to the 36th level, you must obtain the top-level Chonggong Jindan, but there is no rush for the time being. The 35th and 36th levels are only one level apart, and the difference in strength isThe distance is not big. Moreover, with my strength, I am enough to beat the average thirty-sixth heaven cultivator¨〃¨〃!"

Ye Tian said secretly.

Now he wants to improve his strength quickly, not to improve his cultivation, nor to create more ultimate palace secrets, but to comprehend the ultimate palace rules. If he can comprehend the ultimate palace rules, he will definitely be able to increase his strength by a large margin.

However, comprehending the ultimate palace rules is too difficult. He is the ultimate supreme in his own time and space line, and even created the seventh form of the end form. His combat power is almost invincible under the ultimate supreme of the time and space level.

However, the rules of this time and space line are completely different from the time and space line he is in. Different rules need to be re-understood.

"Maybe you can try to join the top forces in the fog domain? ”

Ye Tian thought.

Yuanmeng is not good, there is only one Ultimate Palace Master, who can't help him.

Wu Pavilion is very powerful, but he has no way to join Wu Pavilion!

This day.

Ye Tian came to see Gui Lao again.

"Gui Lao, I want to join some top forces, at least not weaker than Leiyu Palace, preferably Wu Pavilion, is there any way?" Ye Tian asked.

"This..." Gui Lao was shocked. How could he help Ye Tian join these forces? If he could do it, wouldn't he join them himself?

"Senior, I can't do anything, I can only give some suggestions!" Gui Lao said.

"Suggestions are also fine, talk about it. ”

Ye Tian sat down and listened to the old ghost’s story.

The old ghost said: “Senior, the most powerful force in the fog area is naturally the fog pavilion. Although there are several forces second only to the fog pavilion, they can only compete with the fog pavilion when they join forces. If you pass the seventh floor of the fog tower, you can be invited by the fog pavilion to join.”

“Fog tower?”

Ye Tian didn’t know this place yet.

The old ghost continued: “The fog tower is a mysterious place. It was built by a great existence of the fog pavilion. Only by obtaining the fog order can you go to the fog pavilion.”

“¨「 ¨「 Fog order, where is it?” Ye Tian became interested. If he could join the fog pavilion, he would naturally want to join the fog pavilion.

“Senior, the appearance of the fog order is random, but I know which strong people have the fog order. You may be able to trade with them. A fog order can be used nine times. After nine times, the fog order will disappear.” The old ghost said.

"Oh, who has the Fog Order?" Ye Tian asked.

Gui Lao handed some lists to Ye Tian, ​​who put them away and left quickly.

"Could this senior kill one of them to take the Fog Order? Probably not. The names on this list are all well-known figures in Wanchongshan. Each of them is incomparable in combat power. This senior may not be a match." Gui Lao thought.

And Ye Tian did want to kill one of them and directly snatch the Fog Order.

As for the transaction? He didn't think these guys would trade the Fog Order.

"Whose are you going to snatch?"

Ye TianThinking.

He finally decided to snatch the mist order of the master of the Blood God Temple. The master of the Blood God Temple is at the 36th level of the heaven. His strength is quite powerful, but he should not have the ultimate palace. Except for the Thunder Prison Palace, other forces in Wanchong Mountain do not seem to have the ultimate palace technique.

The Blood God Temple had attacked and killed him before, so he did not have any good impression of the Blood God Temple. Killing the master of the Blood God Temple, he did not have any psychological burden.

"Master of the Blood God Temple, it's you!"

Ye Tian decided.

...

Blood God Mountain.

The headquarters of the Blood God Temple is here. The Blood God Temple often carries out assassination missions. Many forces hate the Blood God Temple, but no one dares to attack the Blood God Temple.

However, on this day, a figure descended on the Blood God Temple and broke through the countless formations of the Blood God Mountain with one blow.

"Who dares to break into the Blood Temple headquarters!!!!"

Blood-colored figures appeared in the void, and the terrifying aura made time and space stagnate. These were all beings above the 30th heaven. Qiqi.
